meta.description: Kit Technology — vertical SaaS for Vietnamese businesses. Flagship product: Novixa, a next-generation pharmacy management platform.
meta.keywords: kit technology, saas vietnam, novixa, pharmacy software, vertical saas

home.heroTitle: Building technology solutions for Vietnamese businesses
home.heroSubtitle: Kit Technology develops vertical SaaS — focused on real operations, transparent data, and scalability. First product: Novixa for pharmacies.
home.focus1Desc: No generic software — each product solves concrete operational problems for a specific industry.
home.focus2Desc: Cloud-native, API-first, separate marketing site and product core — independent security and updates.
home.focus3Desc: Data migration, training, and go-live support — customers are not left to deploy alone.
home.portfolioLead: Novixa — pharmacy management by Kit Technology.
home.value1Desc: Features that solve daily problems — not flashy demos.
home.value2Desc: Clear data and trustworthy reports — decisions based on numbers.
home.value3Desc: Long-term roadmap, continuous updates from real user feedback.

about.title: About Kit Technology
about.p1: Kit Technology is a Vietnamese technology company specializing in vertical SaaS — starting in pharmacy with the Novixa brand.
about.p2: We believe SMEs need deep digital tools, not bulky multi-industry ERPs. Each product is designed around real operational workflows.
about.p3: Our team combines enterprise software experience with pharmacy operations — from POS and FEFO batch inventory to customer care.
about.mission: Bring digital technology closer to Vietnamese businesses — easy to deploy, easy to use, with measurable impact.
about.vision: Become a trusted technology partner for vertical industries — each product a benchmark in its segment.

products.title: Products
products.intro: SaaS solutions developed by Kit Technology — each product has its own website and operations team.
products.novixaDesc: Next-generation pharmacy platform: full ERP with POS, FEFO batch inventory, customer CRM, ordering app, and real-time reporting. For GPP pharmacies and small chains in Vietnam.
products.comingDesc: Kit Technology is exploring additional vertical solutions. Contact us to discuss partnership or investment in new products.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Interested in partnership, investment, or our products? Send a message — we will respond as soon as possible.
contact.name: Full name
contact.formNote: Form submissions are sent to Kit Technology email.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We will reply via the phone number or email you provided.

footer.rights: All rights reserved by Kit Technology.
footer.parentNote: Parent company of Novixa — Smart Pharmacy Solutions.
